title: The MC Movie
description: Adds a few things from the Minecraft Movie
body:
Adds a few things from the Minecraft Movie!
## THIS MOD REQUIRES
[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) (For optimised gameplay)\
[GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)\
[Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)
### Also get
[PlayerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
(Better Combat requirement)
## Features
Two new weapons, the battle axe and the spear!\
One new boss, Magolsha\
A powerful staff that shoots exploding fireballs\
A few new magical items
## Installation
Install [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), and [PlayerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator), and this mod, and put it into your mods folder in .minecraft, then launch the game
### Other ways
Open up the Modrinth app, create a new instance, install all of the required mods above, and play!
